title: Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're an ebook author in Nigeria, you're likely frustrated with PayPal's restrictions. PayPal's blanket ban on many African countries leaves you unable to sell your ebooks using the platform you've come to rely on. It's time to explore alternative options that cater to creators like you who face geographic restrictions and banking limitations. In this post, we'll break down the differences between conventional platforms and a crypto-native infrastructure that enables you to sell ebooks without PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. You deserve a fair shot at monetizing your work, regardless of where you're from.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are conventional platforms that process digital payments. They offer a user-friendly interface, payment processing, and customer management tools. However, these platforms come with strict requirements, including Know Your Customer (KYC) checks, which can be a barrier for creators in restricted countries. In contrast, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provides a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, without the need for a payment processor account or KYC verification.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Conventional platforms like PayPal and Stripe have geographic restrictions in place, which can block creators from certain countries. For example, Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and many other African and Asian countries are restricted from using PayPal. This leaves creators without a legitimate way to process payments. A crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, operates independently of these restrictions, allowing creators to sell their ebooks without worrying about geographic limitations. With Unchained Commerce, you can access a wide range of coins and payment options, including 300+ coins supported by NOWPayments.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Conventional platforms charge significant fees for processing payments, anywhere from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction to 5% or more, depending on the platform and payment method. These fees can eat into your profit margins, leaving you with less money in your pocket. A crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce eliminates these fees, allowing you to keep 100% of your earnings. Additionally, transactions are processed instantly, ensuring you receive your payments quickly and efficiently.
Conventional platforms like PayPal and Stripe charge exorbitant fees for processing payments.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're an ebook author in Nigeria or any other restricted country, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. With its complete store infrastructure, automated payment processing, and instant delivery capabilities, you can sell your ebooks without worrying about PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip's restrictions. Choose the Full Stack Bundle and start selling your ebooks today with confidence.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
A crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce eliminates payment fees, ensuring you keep 100% of your earnings.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries, you've come to the right place. Our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provides a complete store infrastructure, including payment processing, automated delivery, and customer management tools. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more and get started with selling your ebooks today.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, including payment processing, automated delivery, and customer management tools.
